heading: Omitted
label: 1120 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which exempted distributed funds from Federal and State income taxes and provided for payment of certain costs, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 89–659, § 1080 Stat. 910Oct. 14, 1966
